character.name: Tactics Ogre Let Us Cling
character.prompt:
Tactics Ogre Let Us Cling Together SNES style chibi female battle mage,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions, slightly stocky stylized body,
large head with small detailed eyes, hand-painted 16-bit sprite shading,
long silver hair flowing past shoulders, short hair bangs across forehead, head bare,
wearing layered ivory and royal blue robe with crimson sash and gold embroidery,
ornate brass pauldrons with engraved trim on shoulders,
deep blue cloak with red inner lining draped behind to mid-calf,
heavy hood fabric folded flat at upper back behind neck, never on head,
tall wooden staff with sapphire crystal orb in right hand,
brown leather belt with bronze buckle and hanging scroll pouches,
young woman early 20s, formal regal stance,
classic 16-bit JRPG pixel art, muted earthy palette with rich jewel-tone accents,
hand-painted shading with dithered gradients, sharp tactical silhouette
